title: Create Docs Page Route in Frontend
description: Add a new route for the docs page in the React frontend application.
details: In the React app (apps/frontend), update the routing configuration to include a new route (e.g., '/docs') that renders a DocsPage component. Ensure the route is accessible from the main navigation or sidebar if present. Use React Router (or the configured router) and follow the project's code style and conventions.
test_strategy: Verify that navigating to '/docs' in the browser renders the new docs page. Check that the route is accessible from the navigation if applicable.

title: Implement DocsPage Component
description: Develop the DocsPage React component to display documentation content.
details: Create a new component (e.g., DocsPage.tsx) in the appropriate directory (e.g., src/pages or src/routes). Structure the component to display documentation content, such as usage instructions, API references, or onboarding guides. Use semantic HTML and ensure accessibility. Optionally, support markdown rendering if documentation is written in markdown files.
test_strategy: Render the DocsPage component in isolation and as part of the app. Confirm that documentation content is displayed correctly and is accessible.

title: Add Documentation Content
description: Write and include relevant documentation content for the docs page.
details: Populate the DocsPage with initial documentation, such as project overview, setup instructions, usage examples, or API references. If using markdown, create a docs.md file and load it in the component. Ensure content is clear, concise, and up to date with the current project state.
test_strategy: Review the rendered docs page to ensure all intended content appears and is accurate. Check for typos and clarity.

title: Test and Validate Docs Page Functionality
description: Manually and (optionally) automatically test the docs page for correct rendering and navigation.
details: Test the docs page in different browsers and screen sizes. Validate that navigation to and from the docs page works as expected. Optionally, add unit or integration tests for the DocsPage component using the project's test framework (e.g., React Testing Library).
test_strategy: Perform manual QA by navigating to '/docs' and verifying content and navigation. Run automated tests if implemented and ensure they pass.
